name: Cocoa Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, slightly beat the eggs.
3. Gradually stir in the sugar. Add vanilla and oil and mix well.
4. Stir in the flour-cocoa mixture, then nuts.
5. Spread the batter in a greased shallow 11x7 or 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 22 to 25 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan, then cut into bars, squares, or diamonds.
Makes 20 to 24 fudgy brownies.
To send bar cookies to students or servicemen, bake in an inexpensive foil pan. Leave uncut; wrap the pan and all for mailing.
